usage_in_stream.mechanism: usage in final chunk when stream_options.include_usage=true (OpenAI-compatible server)

cancellation.propagation_note: OpenAI-compatible server aborts the request in the engine when the client disconnects; abort takes effect at the next scheduling step (as of 2026-07 — re-verify at use time).

priority.mechanism: per-request priority field with --scheduling-policy priority; scheduling itself is engine-owned (as of 2026-07 — re-verify at use time)

provenance.notes: vLLM metric names have changed across versions (waiting/KV-usage gauges renamed in the past) and MUST be resolved via name_mapping, never hardcoded; re-verify mapping at adapter-probe time (as of 2026-07). Example fixture; version/commit/model illustrative.
